---
title: "Study 1 Subjective Descriptive"
author: "Spike"
date: "2025-07-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Packages
```{r packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
```

## Load Data
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
df <- read_excel("data/Study_1_Subjective_Data.xlsx")
head(df)
```

## Factor Recode
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Model = factor(Model),
    Profession = factor(Profession),
    ID = factor(ID)
  )
```

## Long Format
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      Statistical_Accuracy,
      Clarity_and_Structure,
      Conceptual_Depth,
      Pedagogical_Effectiveness
    ),
    names_to = "Dimension",
    values_to = "Rating"
  )
df_long
```

## Model Group
``` {r}
df_long_tb <- df_long %>%
  mutate(
    ModelGroup = case_when(
      str_detect(Model, regex("ChatGPT_4o", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Top",
      str_detect(Model, regex("ChatGPT_o1", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Top",
      str_detect(Model, regex("Grok3", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Bottom",
      str_detect(Model, regex("Gemini_2\\.0", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Bottom",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    ModelGroup = factor(ModelGroup, levels = c("Top", "Bottom", "Other"))
  )
```

## Top vs Bottom Overall Summary
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
TopBottom_comparison_overall <- df_long_tb %>%
  group_by(ModelGroup) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_Rating = mean(Rating, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD_Rating = sd(Rating, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
TopBottom_comparison_overall
```

## Student Summary by Model and Task
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
df_long_tb_stu <- df_long_tb %>%
  filter(Profession == "Student")

stu <- df_long_tb_stu %>%
  group_by(Model, Task) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_Rating = mean(Rating, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD_Rating = sd(Rating, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
stu
```

## Instructor Summary by Model and Task
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
df_long_tb_ins <- df_long_tb %>%
  filter(Profession == "Instructor")

ins <- df_long_tb_ins %>%
  group_by(Model, Task) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_Rating = mean(Rating, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD_Rating = sd(Rating, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
ins
```

## Full Summary by Dimension, Model, Task, and Profession
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
all <- df_long_tb %>%
  group_by(Dimension, Model, Task, Profession) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_Rating = mean(Rating, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD_Rating = sd(Rating, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
all
```
